mapper.select: SELECT DISTINCT p.permission_code FROM admin_user_roles ur INNER JOIN admin_roles r ON r.id = ur.role_id AND r.status = 1 INNER JOIN admin_role_permissions rp ON rp.role_id = r.id INNER JOIN admin_permissions p ON p.id = rp.permission_id AND p.status = 1 INNER JOIN admin_users u ON u.id = ur.user_id AND u.status = 1 WHERE ur.user_id = #{userId}
